query:
SELECT flow_cat, localizacion, COUNT(*) as total_paradas
FROM paradas
WHERE flow_cat IN ('041', '045')
GROUP BY flow_cat, localizacion
ORDER BY flow_cat;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MNpKPTYaa3AiSj.root --database NB4DzLv3DwSWij5HcQ7rQi --execute SELECT flow_cat, localizacion, COUNT(*) as total_paradas
FROM paradas
WHERE flow_cat IN ('041', '045')
GROUP BY flow_cat, localizacion
ORDER BY flow_cat;
